zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Moton於大約1412年出生在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾時，她的父親Robert Moton3歲，母親Cicely Knyveton28歲。她於大約1426年與William Basset在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年7月25日在英國斯塔福爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Moton于大约1412年出生在英国斯塔福爾布洛爾时，她的父亲Robert Moton3岁，母亲Cicely Knyveton28岁。她于大约1426年与William Basset在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1481年7月25日在英国斯塔福爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an altered form of English   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Moton was born about 1412, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, her father, Robert Moton, was 3 and her mother, Cicely Knyveton, was 28. She married William Basset about 1426, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 25 July 1481, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Moton est née environ 1412, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Moton, avait 3 ans et sa mère, Cicely Knyveton, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Basset environ 1426, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1481, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Moton um 1412 in Blore, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Moton 3 und ihre Mutter Cicely Knyveton 28. Sie hat um 1426 in Staffordshire, England William Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. Juli 1481 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Moton è nata il circa 1412 nel Blore, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Robert Moton, aveva 3 anni e sua madre, Cicely Knyveton, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Basset circa 1426, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 luglio 1481, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Motonが約1412年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父Robert Motonは3歳，母Cicely Knyvetonは28歳であった。約1426年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでWilliam Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年7月25日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Moton(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Moton(은)는 3세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely Knyveton(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1426년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 William Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 7월 25일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Moton nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Moton, tinha 3 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Knyveton, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Basset aproximadamente 1426, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1481, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Moton родилась около 1412 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Moton было 3 года, а матери, которую звали Cicely Knyveton, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Basset около 1426 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 июля 1481 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Moton nació aproximadamente 1412, en Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Moton, tenía 3 años y su mamá, Cicely Knyveton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Basset aproximadamente 1426, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de julio de 1481, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
